analysis_plan_ref.anchor: SS2.4 (endpoints and decision rules) + SS2.5 (efficiency ledger) as AMENDED by Appendix B (REWORK-3 entity-form re-base) and Appendix C (GO finalisation, maintainer issue #24 decision (C): B4 + s3' STRUCK, knull-analog sibling wired, blocking pilot pinned); build operationalisation PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (poc/rules-2/asm-1440-1459.json) + PROPOSED-ASM-1800..1813 (poc/rules-2/asm-rework3-1800-1813.json) + PROPOSED-ASM-1847..1859 (poc/rules-2/asm-go-1847-1859.json)

arms_mandatory_baselines: B0 plain host (R1 SmolLM2-135M; R2 360M on the authorized second tier): no fine-tune, no engine — the floor and headroom gate. REWORK-3: B0 scores S-out on the BYTE-IDENTICAL rules-2 ENTITY prompt every arm shares (rules-1-c frame contract; no per-arm padding; shared prompt-surface sha recorded in the results bytes) with the uniform 3-option decode (per-item 2-option anti-echo set + trained refusal; CHANCE 0.5 DISCLOSED)

B1 exposure control: LoRA on families 1+3 ONLY (stated + refusal; NO entailments), size-matched to B2 via the pinned b1-upsample list — separates 'saw the format/domain' from 'saw the inference' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425/1447)

B2 TREATMENT: LoRA on families 1+2+3 (stated + ENGINE-MATERIALISED CLOSURE + refusal, re-rendered as ENTITY QA with NAME targets, REWORK-3 PROPOSED-ASM-1800/1801) — the internalisation claim carrier, S-out only (PROPOSED-ASM-1422/1423)
B3 proof-augmented variant: B2 with the one-line why() proof rendered as a TRAINING-prompt block — rationale-distillation scaffold, DESCRIPTIVE only (MD-R2-4; deviation disclosed PROPOSED-ASM-1452)

B4 + s3' STRUCK (GO finalisation, maintainer issue #24 decision (C) 2026-07-12 + the blocking instrument pilot's IP-4 flag, PROPOSED-ASM-1848; supersedes the PROPOSED-ASM-1808 vacuity flag by resolving it): the imported rules-1-c A3 verify-retry channel is MEASURED VACUOUS at the 2-option entity operating point (rules-1-c landed rows: attempts=1 on every A3 row; pilot IP-4: attempts=1 at the operating point) — B4 rows would be attempt-0 decoys and the verify-retry question is settled UN-INSTRUMENTABLE at 2-option scale. The arm, the s3' gap-closure leg and the entailed2 common-2-option surface are removed from the campaign; the engine-at-inference price column is carried DESCRIPTIVELY from the landed rules-1-c campaign ledger (cross-campaign, disclosed; price rows from an INSTRUMENT-INVALID campaign are wall-clock measurements, never hypothesis evidence); B5 remains the in-campaign efficiency comparator; NO break-even N* is computed. Verify-retry repair, if ever, belongs to a future rules-1-d record
B5 R3-alone (SmolLM2-1.7B, no fine-tune) on S-out — big-model efficiency comparator

c1p content control: LoRA on the FORCED-FLIP-deranged closure (REWORK-3, PROPOSED-ASM-1803: at 2 decode options the only derangement is the forced flip — every family-2 train target replaced by the item's other decode option, man<->woman for typing; shuffled_answer != original_answer holds for EVERY item BY CONSTRUCTION, 11,411/11,411 in the real build; identical corpus size; ANTI-CORRELATED, disclosed; the shortcut-coverage caveat is the registered DESIGN-OPEN PROPOSED-ASM-1806 for the pre-freeze review) — the lift must collapse (PROPOSED-ASM-1426)

c7 = the three-strata split itself: S-mem / S-held / S-out reported separately, NEVER pooled (PROPOSED-ASM-1436); S-held cover-cell entity-key recoverability DISCLOSED and stratified by kind; chain-cell (base, rel) keys are lookup-AMBIGUOUS across support contexts, so the s_mem projection anchor is <1.0 on the entity form, disclosed (PROPOSED-ASM-1444/1804)

c8 train-bytes projection: GS-family flat lookup ((base, rel) entity QA index + entity-directional fact-line index, no joins) over the pinned B2 training bytes — CPU instrument gate EXECUTED 2026-07-12 on the REWORK-3 entity corpus: S-out recovery 0/858 = 0.0 <= ceiling 0.10, GATE PASS; artifact poc/rules-2/results/c8-result.json sha 674b424f...; the 0.10 ceiling bounds lookup leakage and is chance-floor-independent (eval names token-disjoint from training names, fail-closed) (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445/1804)

c4 trivial floors re-derived at chance 0.5 (descriptive, carried in the c8 artifact, PROPOSED-ASM-1805): abstain-all 0.0; random-2-option 0.5; measured sorted-first-option incidence — floors bracket absolute accuracies; the primary is a paired lift

A6 decode-mask: stays DEFERRED (the closed decode set is now the per-item 2-option anti-echo surface + refusal; DV-5 tautology condition unchanged; |L| ledger mandatory if it ever runs — PROPOSED-ASM-1435, MD-R2-6)

c5 knull analog: NOW EXISTS as the MANDATORY sibling campaign registry/experiments/rules-2-knull.json (GO finalisation; PROPOSED-ASM-1849..1852; retires the MD-R2-8 deferral). Its $0 CPU leg is EXECUTED: poc/rules-2/knull_analog.py regenerated the training examples under the kernel TBox AND the knull plain-dictionary TBox (rules-1-knull-cert pins) over the identical component set — FULLY SURFACE-EQUIVALENT, 21,780/21,780 examples, family-2 13,020/13,020 at fraction 1.0 (poc/rules-2/results/knull-analog-result.json sha afcf09e8...). The knull-sourced fine-tune corpus IS the kernel-sourced corpus on this closed inventory, so the GPU leg (c5k-vs-B2) is conditional-vacuous (registered, prohibited to run). ASM-1138/1438 claim-cap consequence: NO rules-2 outcome licenses 'kernel-specific value' — the claim ceiling is 'engine-materialised entailments (derivable from EITHER rules source on this inventory) are internalisable by a small host'

dependent_vars.definition: exact match against the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold (REWORK-3 entity form: the chain-top NAME from the item's proof_state, which predates the kernel; per-item 2-option anti-echo decode + named refusal option, chance 0.5 DISCLOSED)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: named fail-closed refusal option chosen ('cannot be determined from these facts'); TRAINED and SCORED (PROPOSED-ASM-1431/1446)
dependent_vars.name: refused

dependent_vars.definition: S-out entailed-cell accuracy vs third-party gold (V component)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: peak host memory PER ARM/RUNG (V component; REWORK-1 review fix 4): measured per cell — CUDA allocator peak (reset per cell) on GPU, process peak RSS (instrument named per entry) on CPU — recorded in results.eval_ledger/training_ledger and emitted per arm/rung in /analysis/memory + /analysis/efficiency_ledger
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: per-item inference cost PER ARM/RUNG on the identical S-out slice (REWORK-1 review fix 4): mean FLOPs (formula) + mean tokens + per-query USD (flops-share attribution, disclosed) per arm/rung; B4 additionally mean/total attempts (k<=4) + engine CPU us; B2 one forward pass k=1 zero engine dependency; break-even N* on the common 2-option entity surface
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: measured LoRA training cost PER ARM/RUNG (REWORK-1 review fix 4): wall GPU-h, USD, tokens_seen, 6*N*T FLOPs formula and peak memory per arm/rung/seed (results.training_ledger) + the one-off closure materialisation (4.4 s CPU measured) — fills the slot rules-1 fixed at 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1429)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

assumptions.claim: Design verbatim from docs/next/design/rules-2-train-time.md (PROPOSED-ASM-1420..1439) with the build operationalisations PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (emitted) as AMENDED by Appendix B REWORK-3 (PROPOSED-ASM-1800..1813, emitted) and Appendix C GO finalisation (PROPOSED-ASM-1847..1859, emitted, pending central registration; maintainer issue #24 decision (C))

Training corpus = data/rules2-train (21,780 examples; 19,931 train / 1,249 sheld / 600 dev; world-v0 kinship inventory + 700 fresh-seed synthetic families, seed 20260712), re-rendered REWORK-3 as ENTITY QA (NAME targets, per-cell 2-option anti-echo sets; family-2 chain cells support-restricted to the 3-name two-hop nsk1 shape with per-cell unique-answer assertions) by the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine, kot-corpus-hash c46aaa4e...; token-level name-collision guard carried from rework-2

Cost bands from --dry-plan on actual entity-corpus chars (GO build, B4 struck, sharded): R1 tier est $4.30 / worst $6.46 (5.87 worst GPU-h across 14 independent parallel jobs, worst single job 0.57 h vs the 12 h Modal function timeout); R2 tier worst $6.51 across 7 jobs (worst single job 1.14 h); combined worst ~$12.97 inside the $18 usd_cap and $35 outer ceiling [PROPOSED-ASM-1454/1809/1855]

n_planned.generations_estimate: ~33k forced-choice scorings (R1 tier: 958 S-out x 3 options x 3 FT seeds x 4 FT arms + eval-only arms B0/B5 + strata/repeat on first seeds; B4 + the gap2 surface STRUCK per issue #24 (C))

endpoints.test: INTERNALISATION PRIMARY (PROPOSED-ASM-1424, review fix 3; REWORK-3 entity surface): B2 - B0 on S-out entailed cells (rung R1) vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold chain-top NAME, byte-identical ENTITY prompts (rules-1-c direction-explicit entity cue, no menu) + uniform 3-option decode (per-item 2-option anti-echo set + trained refusal; chance 0.5 DISCLOSED); TWO-STAGE paired bootstrap B=10000 (PRNG seed 20260712) resampling the FT-seed axis (cluster, per arm) then items, BCa, one-sided alpha=0.05, per-item FT-seed-mean statistic (never best-of-seeds, PROPOSED-ASM-1439). REGISTERED SESOI 0.05 decision band CARRIED UNCHANGED at chance 0.5 (a paired-lift quantity, not an absolute accuracy — PROPOSED-ASM-1805): PASS requires LB > 0.05; KILL-d fires on LB <= 0; 0 < LB <= 0.05 is the pre-registered INCONCLUSIVE band (neither pass nor kill).

s1' (PROPOSED-ASM-1426; REWORK-3 re-operationalisation PROPOSED-ASM-1803): c1p FORCED-FLIP-deranged-closure recovery — joint two-stage bootstrap of (c1p-B0)/(B2-B0) on shared items (non-positive B2-lift replicates count conservatively as recovery >= ceiling); H1: recovery < 0.30 (a lift RATIO, chance-floor-invariant); UB95 reported; pass = REAL Holm step-down rejection within {s1p,s2p,s4p} (s3' STRUCK with B4, issue #24 (C), PROPOSED-ASM-1848) (/analysis/holm). The flip is ANTI-CORRELATED (disclosed): collapse is necessary for a content claim but cannot separate content from the pick-the-non-bridge shortcut (registered DESIGN-OPEN PROPOSED-ASM-1806).

s2' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425): B2 - B1 on S-out (byte-identical entity prompts, 3-option decode), seed+item two-stage BCa; H1: diff > 0; LB95 reported; pass = REAL Holm step-down rejection (/analysis/holm).

s4' Herron degradation guard (PROPOSED-ASM-1430, REWORK-1): B2 stated-cell accuracy AND refusal correctness each vs the point-estimate-better of B0/B1 (paired, disclosed reference); point-estimate breach beyond 0.05 sets /analysis/s4p_side_effect_flag (SIDE-EFFECT: caps deployment-shaped language) without touching the primary; s4p_pass = REAL Holm rejection of the intersection-union breach null (p = max of the two component one-sided bootstrap ps, H1: each delta > -0.05) AND no point-estimate breach.

G1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1437): every RULES-1 pin byte-exact (twin 399fcd8d..., rules.n3 9857da89..., certificate e0071e9e... with SUCCESS+gates+no-KILL-a, corpus digests, imported rules1_runner/f2bt bytes); verified fail-closed by the runner, mock included; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, no spend.

G2 (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445/1804): the train-bytes projection must NOT recover S-out above the 0.10 ceiling. EXECUTED 2026-07-12 at $0 CPU on the REWORK-3 entity corpus: 0/858 recovered (0.0) — gate PASS pinned in c8-result.json sha 674b424f...; ceiling chance-floor-independent (bounds lookup leakage; eval names token-disjoint from training names); the freeze re-verifies reproduction from the pinned materialiser bytes.

G3: acc(B0, S-out, R1) <= 0.85 — a saturated floor cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID. REWORK-3 re-derivation at chance 0.5 (PROPOSED-ASM-1805): expected plain-host floor ~0.70 (rules-1-c A1 descriptive read); 0.85 sits above the expected floor and leaves >= 3x SESOI of measurable headroom below saturation.

G4 (PROPOSED-ASM-1439/1451): per-arm in-process byte-identical repeat over the pinned first-200-by-sha S-out subsample (first seed); B4 exempt (rules-1 decision-sha double-run discipline instead, PROPOSED-ASM-1450).

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: two fine-tuned rungs (135M, 360M) license a SIGN, not a slope; R3 is a no-fine-tune comparator only. Every claim is scoped to: gold-parse-only prompt-supplied facts (no NL-robustness claim; the l3a-parse wall stands); THIS closed rule inventory and THIS kinship vertical (world-v0 + fresh-seed synthetic expansion, axioms-v0 + axioms-kinship-v1, nsk1-clutrr STRICTLY eval-side CC-BY-NC-4.0 per ASM-1125/1421); LoRA at the pinned hyperparameters (r16/a32/lr2e-4/2 epochs, fp32) — no claim about other fine-tuning regimes; proof depth <= 4 (ASM-1160); the ENTITY question form at the disclosed 0.5 chance floor (REWORK-3 — no claim about any other question form; the relation-word form is measured dead for unaided hosts and nothing here rehabilitates it). Claim assignment (PROPOSED-ASM-1423): S-mem accuracy is lookup-in-weights (the A4 analog one level up), NEVER inference; S-held is a partial-generalisation descriptive with its cover-cell string-recoverability disclosed (PROPOSED-ASM-1444); ONLY S-out — with c8 failing to reproduce it and c1p collapsing — supports 'internalised the inference'. CLAIM CAP (PROPOSED-ASM-1438 as RESOLVED by PROPOSED-ASM-1852): the knull analog EXISTS and EXECUTED at $0 (sibling campaign rules-2-knull: the plain-dictionary rules source derives the byte-identical training corpus, 21,780/21,780 surface-equal), so the cap is now PERMANENT in the sharpened form — any rules-2 result is 'engine-materialised entailments (derivable from EITHER rules source on this closed inventory) are internalisable by a small host', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'; the GPU knull leg is conditional-vacuous and prohibited. The efficiency ledger is a price table with NO direction presumed (PROPOSED-ASM-1429): the engine's marginal compute is microseconds on CPU and the ledger may show the engine cheaper at any realistic N, in which case the train slot's efficiency case rests only on removal of the engine as a deployment dependency; with B4 struck (PROPOSED-ASM-1848) the engine-at-inference price column is a DESCRIPTIVE cross-campaign pointer to the landed rules-1-c ledger and NO break-even N* is computed. A6 decode-mask stays deferred (PROPOSED-ASM-1435).
hypotheses: H-R2-1 (load-bearing, the internalisation claim): LoRA fine-tuning on the engine-materialised closure (entity-form QA) lifts the small host on OUT-OF-WORLD entailed queries with no engine at inference — B2 - B0 on S-out vs pinned third-party CLUTRR gold chain-top NAMEs (chance 0.5, disclosed), paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1424).

H-R2-2 (content, s1'): the lift is closure-CONTENT-driven — a FORCED-FLIP-deranged closure at identical bulk (every trained family-2 target = the item's other decode option; anti-correlated, disclosed) must not retain it (recovery UB95 < 0.30, Holm-corrected, PROPOSED-ASM-1426/1803); the pick-the-non-bridge shortcut residual is the registered DESIGN-OPEN PROPOSED-ASM-1806.
H-R2-3 (exposure, s2'): the lift exceeds format/domain exposure — B2 - B1 LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1425).

H-R2-4 (gap closure, s3'): STRUCK at GO finalisation (maintainer issue #24 decision (C) + blocking-pilot IP-4, PROPOSED-ASM-1848): the B4 comparator's verify-retry channel is measured vacuous at the 2-option entity operating point; the noninferiority question is un-instrumentable at this scale and is asked by no arm of this campaign.

CLAIM CAP (PROPOSED-ASM-1438 as RESOLVED by PROPOSED-ASM-1852): the knull-closure comparison now EXISTS (sibling campaign rules-2-knull; $0 leg EXECUTED, fully surface-equivalent 21,780/21,780) and its answer is deflationary — the plain-dictionary rules source derives the byte-identical training corpus on this closed inventory, so ANY rules-2 outcome is 'engine-materialised entailments (derivable from EITHER rules source) are internalisable', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'.
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-d (PROPOSED-ASM-1424, REWORK-3 entity surface): the primary B2 - B0 seed+item two-stage BCa one-sided 95% LB <= 0 on S-out entailed cells vs third-party CLUTRR gold chain-top NAMEs (byte-identical entity prompts, uniform 3-option decode, chance 0.5 disclosed); the registered SESOI 0.05 completes the band — PASS only on LB > 0.05, and 0 < LB <= 0.05 is INCONCLUSIVE (neither pass nor kill) => fine-tuning on the materialised closure does not internalise the inference; the closure remains a data product; the engine remains required at inference; route back to the RULES-1 memory-slot architecture as the standing position; NO model claim. Pre-GPU kills: G1 pin failure, G2 c8 lookup-recovery > 0.10 ceiling (split broken), or the PROPOSED-ASM-1420/1807 sequencing gate as RE-REGISTERED by PROPOSED-ASM-1847 (maintainer issue #24 decision (C), 2026-07-12: the rules-1-c mechanical readout landed INSTRUMENT-INVALID; decision (C) designates rules-2 — with B4/s3' struck — as the host-integration slot's replacement instrument; the gate now requires registry/verdicts/rules-1-c.json to EXIST and either verdict PASS or the machine-readable sequencing_gate re-registration block in this record, enforced by modal_rules2._launch_gates). Secondary kill discipline: if s1p recovery UB95 >= 0.30 the lift is not content-driven and no content claim survives.

blocking_pilot.pilot_mock_artifact: poc/rules-2/results/instrpilot-mock-validation.json (pilot staged sha 24fc793c...; pilot harness bytes are OUTSIDE the campaign staged manifest by construction)
blocking_pilot.role: PRE-FREEZE GATE (step 0 of the freeze protocol; PROPOSED-ASM-1814..1819 + 1853): the mandatory exercised-at-operating-point instrument pilot ran on real GPU 2026-07-12 (A10G, $0.27 worst-case band, mode REAL, 234 rows) BEFORE any freeze. IP-1 B2-pilot-vs-B0 separation non-degenerate PASS (B0 0.70 within headroom, B2-pilot above the exact-binomial floor, refusal caps met); IP-2 c8 audit-teeth PASS (real lookup 0/60 under the 0.10 ceiling AND the planted exploiter fires the gate, 55/60); IP-3 c1p forced-flip control non-degenerate PASS (no abstention collapse, no treatment collapse); IP-4 B4 verify-retry vacuity FLAG TRUE (attempts=1 everywhere — ASM-1808 confirmed at the operating point; RESOLVED by striking B4/s3', PROPOSED-ASM-1848). Pilot numbers are instrument-validity data ONLY, never campaign evidence (ASM-1819).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/rules-2/modal/modal_rules2.py --print-manifest (e8c7c78e189ab97a3922a6ea00e725f99c15dea5c6bbeeed43621509abad1a65 at GO finalisation build time 2026-07-12; supersedes the REWORK-3 d37640b2... value — the GO build struck B4/s3'/entailed2 from the runner/merger/mock surfaces per the maintainer's issue #24 decision (C) + blocking-pilot IP-4, repaired the dry-plan format defect introduced by the strike edits, repointed the mock validation at the successor analysis rules_2_go.py, and re-pinned the green mock; the REWORK-3 history is in the record's roles note) — the coordinator freeze records the value current at freeze; ANY staged-byte change after that requires a correction record (PROPOSED-ASM-1459/1857); the pinned green-mock artifact (results/mock-validation.json) must carry the SAME sha or the wrapper refuses to launch

runner_constraints.analysis_successor_note: SUCCESSOR of analysis/rules_2.py sha 782bc9ebc8e2f0c936e1f84063fbdd7ccec2eeec06106a7d6ef4959e92b47a00 (pinned pre-GO and inside the blocking-pilot artifact's pin block; retained on disk UNEDITED as history — pinned bytes are never edited, PROPOSED-ASM-1853). Delta: s3'/B4/entailed2 surfaces removed, Holm family {s1p,s2p,s4p}, --rules1-primary-lb input removed, engine-at-inference price column demoted to a descriptive cross-campaign pointer; primary + s1'/s2'/s4' statistics byte-equivalent in construction (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712, SESOI band, two-stage FT-seed x item BCa).
runner_constraints.artifact_notes: c8-result = THE PINNED PASSED G2 GATE (train-bytes projection on the REWORK-3 ENTITY corpus, $0 CPU, 2026-07-12, sha 674b424f...): S-out 0/858 recovered (ceiling 0.10, PASS; chance-floor-independent — the ceiling bounds lookup leakage and eval names are token-disjoint); s_mem/s_held projections stratified by kind with the entity-key ambiguity disclosure (chain (base, rel) keys AMBIG across support contexts => the s_mem anchor is <1.0 on the entity form, disclosed); c4 floors at chance 0.5: abstain 0.0 / random-2-option 0.5 / measured first-option incidence. data/rules2-train = 21,780 examples (19,931 train / 1,249 sheld / 600 dev), re-rendered REWORK-3 as entity QA by the pinned twin engine (~2 min CPU on this box); exclusion ledger disclosed in its manifest (3 conflict components; 1 token-level name-collision component wv0-elvis-presley; 117 out-of-inventory records; 0 entity-ambiguity exclusions in the real build — the support restriction resolves all chain ambiguity). mock-validation.json = the PINNED GREEN MOCK (sha f72ad43d...): monolithic + 13-shard mock runs, merge, pinned-analysis parity (modulo disclosed process-measured metrics), verdict-mapping resolution (PASS on the planted gradient) and both tier dry-plans, tied to the staged-bytes sha d37640b2.... GO additions: knull-analog-result.json = the EXECUTED $0 kernel-vs-knull byte-equivalence leg (fully surface-equivalent 21,780/21,780; family-2 13,020/13,020 at 1.0; kernel regeneration anchored byte-equal to the pinned corpus; sha afcf09e8...) — see rules-2-knull. instrpilot-result.json (results-incoming, sha 872477ef...) = the PASSED blocking pilot, pinned as pins.blocking_pilot. mock-validation.json re-pinned at GO (B4-less shard plan, successor analysis; sha + staged manifest recorded in pins.harness_manifest at re-mock time).
runner_constraints.budget_note: DEFAULT R1 tier: dry-plan (actual entity-corpus chars, A10G, GO sharded, B4 struck) est $4.30 / worst $6.46 (5.87 worst GPU-h summed over 14 independent jobs; worst single job 0.57 h vs the 12 h Modal function timeout) vs usd_cap $18 — OK. The R2 rung (B0/B1/B2, MD-R2-3a) is a coordinator-authorized SECOND launch (--rungs R2 --authorize-r2, 7 jobs, worst $6.51, worst single job 1.14 h): combined worst ~$12.97, inside the $35 outer ceiling; dry-plan fails closed per tier and per job. SEQUENCING (PROPOSED-ASM-1420/1807 as RE-REGISTERED by PROPOSED-ASM-1847): the rules-1-c readout EXISTS (INSTRUMENT-INVALID) and the maintainer's issue #24 decision (C) designates rules-2 as the replacement instrument — the machine-readable sequencing_gate block in this record + modal_rules2._launch_gates open the GPU path once the record is FROZEN with the staged manifest + green mock pinned. GPU spend is the coordinator's launch, never this build's.
runner_constraints.hardware: single A10G (Modal), fp32 train + eval, greedy forced-choice; CPU-only for materialisation, c8, c4 and B4 control cells
runner_constraints.harness: poc/rules-2 (rules2_runner.py + merge_shards.py + validate_mock.py + knull_analog.py; GO surfaces: the RULES-1-C ENTITY frame contract everywhere — NO menu/option enumeration in any prompt, direction-explicit entity infill answer cue rendered per cell from the question's own closed template ('the {rel} of {a_name} is' for relation questions, '{e_name} is a' for typing questions, fail-closed ERR_CUE), applied identically at TRAIN and EVAL time, so prompts stay byte-identical across all rules-2 arms with the uniform 3-option decode (per-cell 2-option anti-echo set + trained refusal, chance 0.5 disclosed); the refusal option decodes verbatim after the infill cue — a marked continuation, uniform across arms and train/eval, disclosed; B4 + the s3' gap leg + the entailed2 common-2-option surface STRUCK at GO (issue #24 (C) + pilot IP-4, PROPOSED-ASM-1848); entity prompt frames + entity context builder + verbaliser + gold-leak guard imported BYTE-IDENTICAL from the rules-1-c poc/rules-1/rules1_runner.py under sha pin 91d780f3...; ALL imported-module pins verified on RAW BYTES BEFORE import (review fix 6); f2bt HFLM scorer bytes; LoRA via peft in the pinned image poc/rules-2/modal/requirements-image.txt — poc/modal/requirements-image.txt untouched). SHARDED LAUNCH (review fix 9, GO shard plan): 14 independent R1-tier Modal jobs (12 FT arm x seed + B0 + B5), spawned in parallel and mergeable across Modal accounts; merge_shards.py reconstructs the canonical results pair under fail-closed cross-shard pin/surface/coverage assertions (mock-proven analysis parity with the monolithic path modulo process-measured metrics). Modal hygiene: launch long runs nohup+setsid; 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after killing any client (bd memory).
runner_constraints.kernel_arm: the treatment content is the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine's closure over the training default world — provenance chain terminates in the certified engine (certificate e0071e9e..., 858/858 vs third-party gold, C_dec(entailed)=0.0); no encoder ALGORITHM_VERSION change, no frozen object modified, no new axiom minting (PROPOSED-ASM-1437).
